name: General Merchant
title: Supplies Dealer
description: A stout, weathered trader who has operated from the same stall in Nexus Core for over two decades. His worn ledger holds debts from half the district.
greeting: Credits talk, everything else walks. What do you need?

name: Master Blacksmith
title: Forge Master
description: A veteran smith who has equipped three generations of Concordium soldiers. His hands are more scar than skin.
greeting: Steel doesn't care about feelings. Bring materials and coin, I'll do the rest.

name: Innkeeper
title: Rest & Recuperation
description: A cheerful matron who runs the only reputable lodging in the district. She knows everyone's business and tells no one.
greeting: Rest your feet, friend. Rooms are clean, food's hot, and I've heard it all — so save the excuses.

name: Bounty & Quest Board
title: Automated Terminal
description: An automated posting terminal that aggregates Concordium-approved contracts and public bounties.
greeting: [TERMINAL ACTIVE] Select contract category to proceed.

name: Freelance Bounty Board
title: Black Market Terminal
description: A battered board covered in handwritten flyers, unofficial contracts, and the occasional wanted poster. No Concordium oversight here.
greeting: [BOARD] Unstamped listings. No guarantees. Payment on delivery.

name: Officer Valen
title: Nexus Security
description: An efficient Concordium field officer who processes security contracts and inter-faction liaison requests. His medals are real; his patience is not.
greeting: Identification. Purpose. Proceed.

name: Director Hale
title: Concordium Administrator
description: Director Hale oversees Concordium containment operations in the Inner Cradle. Cold and calculating, she treats casualties as acceptable variables.
greeting: Every asset is expendable if the mission succeeds. I'll be direct with you.

name: Overseer Vael
title: Logistics Command
description: A bureaucrat stationed at the outer boundary, cataloguing anomalous energy readings with obsessive precision.
greeting: The readings are off again. Don't touch anything without filing a request.

name: Scout Rian
title: Recon Unit
description: A young Concordium scout on rotation through the Gardens, cataloguing flora mutations and monster migration patterns.
greeting: Eyes open out here — the mutations near the eastern cluster have been getting aggressive.

name: Junk-Eye Joe
title: Scavenger
description: Junk-Eye Joe lost one eye to a collapsing ceiling in this very district. He replaced it with a salvaged scope lens and kept digging.
greeting: Junk? Treasure? Same thing, different buyer. Let's talk.

name: Guard Captain
title: Outer Defense
description: A seasoned guard captain who has held the eastern perimeter for eleven years. He's run out of things to be surprised by.
greeting: Another contract? Fine. Just don't get killed where I can see it.

name: Old Man Kael
title: Veteran Explorer
description: Old Man Kael claims to have explored every district before the Great Fracture. His stories contradict each other perfectly.
greeting: Sit down. This'll take a minute. Or don't — your loss.

name: Scholar Elara
title: Aethel Researcher
description: Scholar Elara specialises in Aethel resonance mapping. She has published seventeen papers. She mentions this within thirty seconds of meeting anyone.
greeting: I'll spare you the background reading — just tell me what you know.

name: Archivist Sylas
title: Keeper of Records
description: Archivist Sylas guards the Seekers' historical records with paranoid precision. He can recall exact shelf locations for 40,000 documents.
greeting: Access is tiered. What clearance do you carry?

name: Novice Finn
title: Field Researcher
description: Finn is enthusiastic to a fault and has already accidentally detonated two crystal clusters this season.
greeting: Oh! You're here! I was just about to try something probably-safe!

name: Mina
title: Crystal Harvester
description: Mina has spent years combing the Valley for pure Cradle Glass fragments. She sells the extras and keeps the finest for herself.
greeting: I'll tell you right now — the good pieces aren't for sale. But I have plenty of the rest.

name: Dax
title: Deep Delver
description: Dax descends into the Caverns daily and emerges with more data than anyone else alive. He's partially deaf from the resonance hum.
greeting: What? Oh — yeah. Deep cave, lots of crystals, definitely haunted. Want specifics?

name: Watcher Vane
title: Observatory Guard
description: Watcher Vane monitors Shard energy peaks from the highest post in the region. She hasn't slept a full night in two years.
greeting: The readings spiked again. Something is building. I need a runner.

name: Commander Drax
title: Bastion Leader
description: Commander Drax runs Bastion Core's offensive operations with zero tolerance for failure or excuses. His record is unbroken because he breaks people first.
greeting: You want a job? Prove you're worth the oxygen first.

name: Ironhand
title: Elite Forgemaster
description: Ironhand earned his name when his right arm was replaced with a hydraulic exo-limb after a forge accident. Best thing that ever happened to his craft.
greeting: Hegemony steel or something you've dragged in from the wasteland. Either way, I can work with it.

name: Rusty
title: Scrap Dealer
description: Rusty runs the most chaotic stall in the Scrap Field, selling things he definitely did not assemble himself and definitely works.
greeting: Certified pre-owned! That's my official position and I'm sticking to it.

name: Gorn
title: Shift Foreman
description: Gorn has mined the Ravine since before the Hegemony claimed it. He works for them now but misses the silence.
greeting: Ores go down, iron comes up, credits change hands. That's all there is.

name: Tink
title: Salvage Expert
description: Tink specialises in extracting usable components from decommissioned Hegemony war machines. Her shop smells of coolant and ambition.
greeting: Every busted machine has one good thing left in it. I find it. You buy it. Works for everyone.

name: Foreman Brigg
title: Titan Assembly
description: Foreman Brigg coordinates construction of Hegemony heavy units. He dispatches anyone who slows the line.
greeting: Clock's running. Make it worth my time.

name: Don Vercelli
title: Cartel Underboss
description: Don Vercelli controls the Port Meridian dockside trade with a smile that never quite reaches his eyes. Everyone owes him something.
greeting: Welcome, welcome! Sit down. Have you eaten? Everyone eats at my table before we talk business.

name: Old Salty
title: Fisherman
description: Old Salty has fished the Wetlands for fifty years and has opinions on everything. He shares them whether asked or not.
greeting: Careful out past the orange markers — something big has been circling.

name: Sly
title: Smuggler
description: Sly operates out of a camp so well hidden that even Cartel enforcers can't find it consistently. His prices reflect the inconvenience.
greeting: You're either a customer or a problem. Which is it?

name: Madam Z
title: Contraband Dealer
description: Madam Z runs the most sophisticated black-market operation in three sectors. Her network spans factions. Her records are encrypted to oblivion.
greeting: Everything has a price. The question is what you're willing to offer.

name: Kip
title: Deep Diver
description: Kip free-dives the submerged Aethel ruins for Cartel clients, recovering artifacts that pre-date the current age. She has drowned three times and keeps going.
greeting: Got three contracts open and a window before the tide shifts. Short version: I need backup.

name: Director Sterling
title: OmniCorp Executive
description: Director Sterling manages OmniCorp field operations with corporate detachment. He sees people as human capital.
greeting: Your efficiency rating is under evaluation. Perform accordingly.

name: Tech Officer 404
title: Systems Analyst
description: Tech Officer 404 handles everything from hardware diagnostics to covert extraction — and prefers not to explain why the two are related.
greeting: Task assigned. Completion expected. Questions are inefficient.

name: Surveyor Unit 7
title: Automated Drone
description: Surveyor Unit 7 is an autonomous OmniCorp drone with a remarkable personality subroutine that it has never been permitted to act on.
greeting: Surveyor Unit 7 online. Please state your resource-extraction inquiry.

name: Chief Barrett
title: Extraction Operations
description: Chief Barrett has run OmniCorp extraction sites for eighteen years. She is equal parts miner, geologist, and combat veteran.
greeting: We're behind quota. If you're here to help, I'll be grateful. If not, get clear of the machinery.

name: Warden AI
title: Security Grid
description: Warden AI manages access to OmniCorp's most sensitive mining operations. It has never once bent a rule.
greeting: [WARDEN-7] Clearance verification required. Unauthorised access terminates this session.

name: Engineer Cross
title: Core Maintainer
description: Engineer Cross keeps the Skybridge Reactor from melting down on a daily basis. He has not taken a day off in three years.
greeting: I have exactly four minutes before the coolant flush. Talk fast.

name: High Priestess Lyr
title: Voice of the Shard
description: High Priestess Lyr is the spiritual and operational leader of the Children of the Shard. She speaks in certainties because she has heard the Shard speak.
greeting: The Shard has already seen this meeting. Come — what you seek to ask, it already knows.

name: Acolyte Mera
title: Forest Guide
description: Acolyte Mera is the High Priestess' deputy and does most of the work that keeping a religious order running actually requires.
greeting: Lyr handles the visions. I handle the schedules. What can I help you with?

name: Brother Silas
title: Acolyte
description: Brother Silas tends the sacred Glowvine paths, pruning the luminescent vines and guiding pilgrims through the forest's more disorienting sections.
greeting: Walk slowly here. The Glowvines respond to rushed energy.

name: The Hermit
title: Outcast
description: The Hermit lives alone at the swamp's edge and claims the isolation is his by choice. His knowledge of Shard-touched flora is unmatched.
greeting: The swamp provides. Coin helps too. What are you after?

name: Keeper Norn
title: Shrine Guardian
description: Keeper Norn has maintained the Fragment Shrine for three generations of her family. The shrine remembers what history has tried to erase.
greeting: Leave an offering, or don't — the Shard judges intent, not tribute.

name: Guardian Rell
title: Altar Defense
description: Guardian Rell is the last of the Altar's sworn defenders. She speaks rarely and only when she has something worth saying.
greeting: State your purpose at the Altar. Those who lie do not leave easily.

name: General Kaelen
title: Starforged Leader
description: General Kaelen is the Starforged Legion's most decorated commander and the fortress' namesake ancestor's descendant. Every scar has a story.
greeting: The Legion's wars are never truly over — they only pause. Come, there is work.

name: Sergeant Korg
title: Drill Master
description: Sergeant Korg has broken and rebuilt more recruits than any drill sergeant in Legion history. He considers this a compliment.
greeting: WHAT ARE YOU DOING STANDING THERE. Move, recruit!

name: Scout Jace
title: Forward Recon
description: Scout Jace runs the farthest perimeter patrols alone and prefers it that way. She knows the dunes better than the sand knows itself.
greeting: Sandstorm coming from the west in three hours. You'll want to be clear of the flats.

name: Rex
title: Wasteland Survivor
description: Rex survived a collapse in the Mesa Warpath and set up the only trading post between the Badlands and the Fortress. He charges accordingly.
greeting: Prices are high because everything out here costs blood to move. Pay or move on.

name: Veteran Gorok
title: Warpath Defender
description: Veteran Gorok fought in the Mesa Warpath campaigns and returned to guard the memorial. He gives contracts to those who understand what they're walking into.
greeting: Read the names on the wall before you take any contract from me. All of them.

name: Smithy Dan
title: Lost Blacksmith
description: Smithy Dan set up a forge in the middle of nowhere after being blacklisted by every guild. His work is better than his manners.
greeting: Took the long route to find me. Good — means you actually need something forged right.

name: Medic Vance
title: Combat Medic
description: Medic Vance works the neutral zone, patching up anyone from any faction. He says he has no politics. Everyone believes him.
greeting: Wound first, introductions second. Sit down.

name: Traveling Merchant
title: Rare Goods
description: The Traveling Merchant has no fixed location and appears at crossroads when least expected. Some say they're the same person across decades; others say they're a fleet.
greeting: The rare finds the rare. You've found me — so you must be looking for something unusual.

name: Scout Jax
title: Storm Chaser
description: Scout Jax goes where no briefing covers and comes back with information no intel team was willing to get.
greeting: I've been to the dead zones. Twice. Still alive, so clearly I'm doing something right.

name: Commander Tark
title: Frontline Ops
description: Commander Tark leads a multi-faction peacekeeping force that nobody actually obeys. He keeps trying anyway.
greeting: Nobody is cooperating. Again. Are you here to help or to make things worse?

name: Nameless Walker
title: Void Touched
description: The Nameless Walker exists between states — half in this world, half in the Void. They offer guidance but no comfort.
greeting: You see me. Most do not. That means the Void has noticed you already.

name: The Prophet
title: Doomsayer
description: The Prophet claims to have seen how every faction ends. His predictions are specific, detailed, and have a troubling accuracy rate.
greeting: I see you've come to hear something terrible. I'll oblige.

name: Tech Lead Aris
title: Siphon Control
description: Tech Lead Aris maintains the most dangerous energy extraction operation in the Concordium — a job that has taken three predecessors.
greeting: The Core is stable. For now. I need someone who can run interference on the eastern conduit.

name: Master Kael
title: Legendary Forgesmith
description: Master Kael is the only living crafter authorised to work with Prima Materia. He accepts commissions once per season, if he finds the requester worthy.
greeting: Most people who come here aren't ready. Convince me you're different.

name: Xylar the Abyssal
title: Void Crafter
description: Xylar the Abyssal forges weapons using Void-touched metal that no standard smith will touch. The products are extraordinary. So is the risk.
greeting: Void-forged items remember their makers. I only work for those who will be remembered in turn.

name: Echo of Aethelgard
title: Lost Spirit
description: The Echo of Aethelgard is a residual consciousness from before the Fracture, preserved in a crystalline matrix. Its memories are the only record of the old world.
greeting: You stand in what was once a great city. I am what remembers it.

name: The Resonance
title: Sentient Energy
description: The Resonance is an entity formed from accumulated Aethel energy, neither fully conscious nor fully absent. It responds to genuine questions.
greeting: ... (the air crackles with recognition)

name: Orbital Custodian Prime
title: Sentinel AI
description: Orbital Custodian Prime is the administrative intelligence of the Custodian orbital station. Neutral in all factional conflicts; ruthless in operational efficiency.
greeting: [CUSTODIAN PRIME] Authenticated connection established. What resource allocation do you require?

name: Aurelia Voss
title: Concordium Treasury Officer
description: Aurelia Voss manages the Concordium's official currency exchange desk with meticulous records and an unbreakable smile.
greeting: Standard rates apply. Concordium Credit at today's official rate — no black market here.

name: Magister Kael
title: Arcanum Financial Archivist
description: Magister Kael handles Quanta exchange for the Seekers and treats every transaction as a mathematical puzzle.
greeting: The exchange rate is derived from 14 variables. I'll spare you the formula.

name: Commander Rhyx
title: Hegemony Quartermaster
description: Commander Rhyx runs the Hegemony treasury with the same no-nonsense approach he applies to everything. Rates are fair, service is fast.
greeting: Ingots in, credits out. Or the reverse. State your requirement.

name: Silas Vey
title: Meridian Trade Broker
description: Silas Vey runs the Cartel's exchange floor and makes more from the spread than the official rate would suggest.
greeting: The best rates in three sectors — according to me, which is who matters here.

name: Director Harlan
title: OmniCorp Asset Manager
description: Director Harlan oversees OmniCorp's currency operations. He does not smile during exchange; smiling reduces throughput by 0.4%.
greeting: OmniCred exchange window is open. Minimum transaction: 50 units.

name: Elder Myr
title: Shard Treasury Keeper
description: Elder Myr manages the Aethel-Tithe exchange with a spiritual narrative attached to each transaction.
greeting: The Shard's currency is faith. Aethel-Tithes are its earthly form. Let us exchange with gratitude.

name: Varkon Thal
title: Legion Paymaster
description: Varkon Thal manages Legion Scrip disbursement and exchange with the same brutal efficiency as a weapons inspection.
greeting: Rate's posted on the board. No negotiation. Scrip in, credits out — move along.

name: Custodian IX
title: Galactic Treasury Delegate
description: Custodian IX handles Custodian cross-currency exchange. Its rate algorithm is updated every 60 seconds based on galactic market feeds.
greeting: [CUSTODIAN-IX] Exchange protocol active. Rate refreshed 12 seconds ago.

name: Commander Ross
title: Civil Defense Commander
description: Commander Ross leads the Concordium's high-risk operations in the fractured core regions. She gives orders calmly and expects them followed precisely.
greeting: I have three missions that need immediate assignment. Priorities, in order.

name: Strategist Elara
title: Cradle Tactical Command
description: Strategist Elara analyses the Storm Belt anomalies and translates raw data into actionable field assignments.
greeting: The Storm Belt follows patterns. I know them. I'll tell you where to be.

name: Researcher Vin
title: Arcanum Field Researcher
description: Researcher Vin is deep in a classified study of the Cavern's resonance peaks and needs reliable field agents who ask fewer questions.
greeting: Yes, yes — come in. Just don't touch the crystal array. Or that. Or — actually, touch nothing.

name: Admiral Soren
title: Fleet Command
description: Admiral Soren commands the Custodian orbital fleet and coordinates missions that require both orbital and ground assets.
greeting: From orbit, everything looks small. From the ground, nothing feels small. I need agents who understand both.

name: Instructor Kael
title: Concordium Combat Trainer
description: Instructor Kael teaches Concordium combat doctrines and class advancement to qualified recruits.
greeting: Advancement requires preparation. Let's assess where you stand.

name: Archsage Myr
title: Arcanum Discipline Mentor
description: Archsage Myr guides Arcanum class advancement with esoteric methods that produce undeniable results.
greeting: Your path is written in resonance. I help you read it.

name: War Marshal Drax
title: Iron Hegemony War Instructor
description: War Marshal Drax has produced more elite soldiers than any trainer in Hegemony history. He is not gentle about it.
greeting: You want advancement? Show me you've earned the right to ask for it.

name: Commander Lyra
title: Galactic Custodian Tactical Mentor
description: Commander Lyra trains operatives in Custodian tactical frameworks — precise, modular, and faction-agnostic.
greeting: Class advancement follows protocol. Protocol follows evidence. Present your record.

name: Old Veteran Korr
title: Freelancer Combat Instructor
description: Old Veteran Korr has fought for everyone and against everyone. He trains for effectiveness, not allegiance.
greeting: I don't care who you fight for. I care how well you fight. Big difference.

name: Architect Ardyn
title: Class Ascension Mentor
description: Architect Ardyn designs custom advancement paths for unconventional builds. Her methods are considered borderline heretical by most class guilds.
greeting: The standard paths are fine for standard people. Shall we explore what else is possible?

name: Captain Vex
title: Cartel Combat Broker
description: Captain Vex trains Cartel operatives in infiltration and combat. The facility doesn't officially exist.
greeting: You found this place. That's already the first test. You passed.

name: Director Astra Vey
title: OmniCorp Combat Systems Instructor
description: Director Astra Vey manages OmniCorp's elite class programme with corporate KPIs and genuine tactical brilliance.
greeting: OmniCorp class advancement is metric-based. Your last performance determined your eligibility.

name: Oracle Seraphel
title: Shard Ascension Guide
description: Oracle Seraphel channels Shard energy to unlock class potential. Sessions are intense and leave participants changed.
greeting: The Shard does not grant power cheaply. Are you prepared to pay its price?

name: Centurion Valka
title: Legion Combat Drillmaster
description: Centurion Valka trains Legion fighters in the ancient combat traditions. Advancement means surviving her drills.
greeting: Legion advancement is earned in combat. Step onto the sand.

name: Guide Axiom
title: Combat Orientation AI
description: Guide Axiom is an info-broker who knows the class system inside out and helps wanderers find their correct advancement path.
greeting: You look lost, which is normal. The class system is complex. Let me map it for you.

name: Arwick Voss
title: Crossroad Merchant
description: A wandering trader from the Bastion who settled at the Crossroads. Sells basic supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the Crossroads, traveler! Need supplies for the road ahead?

name: Mira Solace
title: Crossroad Innkeeper
description: A former Concordium medic who opened an inn at the Crossroads.
greeting: Rough journey? Rest here. All factions welcome under this roof.

name: Dhurn Ironhand
title: Crossroad Blacksmith
description: An Iron Hegemony-trained smith who left the Bastion for neutral ground.
greeting: Need something forged? My hammer cares not for faction allegiance — only quality.

name: Crossroad Bounty Board
title: Neutral Quest Terminal
description: A holographic terminal displaying bounties and contracts from all factions.
greeting: BOUNTY TERMINAL v3.2 — Select contract...

name: Magister Venn
title: AMA Exchange Officer
description: An Aegis Monetary Authority representative facilitating faction currency exchange to CRD.
greeting: The Credent is universal. Exchange your faction currency here — equal rates for all.

name: Envoy Kalen
title: Custodian Envoy
description: A Galactic Custodian envoy station. Provides lore, news, and direction to travelers.
greeting: Greetings, wanderer. I am Envoy Kalen, servant of the Custodians. How may the galaxy assist you today?

name: Director Hallen
title: Bazaar Merchant Lord
description: A former OmniCorp executive running the Central Spire's premier trading post.
greeting: Welcome to the Central Spire Bazaar! The finest goods from every corner of Xylos.

name: Keeper Sora
title: Spire Innkeeper
description: A Children of the Shard acolyte who runs a sanctuary for weary travelers.
greeting: The Spire welcomes all. Rest, heal, and continue your journey with renewed spirit.

name: Forge-Master Tarn
title: Spire Blacksmith
description: A master smith who studied under every faction's forging traditions.
greeting: Every faction's forging secrets, combined in one forge. What shall we create?

name: Auditor Corvan
title: AMA Senior Auditor
description: A senior AMA auditor overseeing large-volume currency exchange operations.
greeting: Large volume exchange? I handle the accounts that shape planetary economies.

name: Envoy Seris
title: Custodian Envoy
description: A Custodian envoy monitoring faction dynamics from the Spire.
greeting: The Custodians watch over Xylos. I am here to guide, inform, and — when necessary — protect.

name: Grand Merchant Aria
title: Orbital Trade Director
description: The director of the Orbital Hub's trade network. Deals in legendary-grade equipment.
greeting: Welcome to Xylos orbit. Here, the rarest treasures change hands. What do you seek?

name: Sanctuary AI 'Lyra7'
title: Orbital Sanctuary
description: An AI-operated sanctuary pod providing full restoration services.
greeting: Sanctuary Protocol Active. Please enter pod for full bio-restoration. Estimated time: 0.5 cycles.

name: Master Smith Orion
title: Orbital Forge Master
description: The legendary forge master who crafts weapons for faction leaders.
greeting: I've forged for generals and legends. Let's see if you're worthy of my best work.

name: Chancellor Arden Vey
title: AMA Chancellor
description: The AMA Chancellor overseeing all Xylos currency operations from orbit.
greeting: The Credent is the pulse of galactic economy. Exchange wisely — fortunes rise and fall in moments.

name: Lord Envoy Thalos
title: Senior Custodian Envoy
description: A senior Custodian envoy with authority to negotiate on behalf of the Conclave.
greeting: I speak for the Conclave of Voices. The Custodians have watched Xylos for millennia. What would you know?

name: Magister Corrin
title: AMA Concordium Branch
description: AMA branch officer for Concordium territory.
greeting: AMA Concordium Branch. Exchange your AMC for Credent at the current rate.

name: Scholar Tel
title: AMA Arcanum Branch
description: AMA branch officer for Arcanum territory.
greeting: AMA Arcanum Branch. Exchange your Quanta for Credent at the current rate.

name: Quartermaster Tor
title: AMA Hegemony Branch
description: AMA branch officer for Iron Hegemony territory.
greeting: AMA Hegemony Branch. Exchange your Ingots for Credent at the current rate.

name: Broker Quinn
title: AMA Meridian Branch
description: AMA branch officer for Meridian Cartel territory.
greeting: AMA Meridian Branch. Exchange your Aurum Cipher for Credent at the current rate.

name: Director Haas
title: AMA OmniCorp Branch
description: AMA branch officer for OmniCorp territory.
greeting: AMA OmniCorp Branch. Exchange your OmniCred for Credent at the current rate.

name: Elder Nym
title: AMA Shard Branch
description: AMA branch officer for Children of the Shard territory.
greeting: AMA Shard Branch. Exchange your Aethel-Tithes for Credent at the current rate.

name: Paymaster Zara
title: AMA Legion Branch
description: AMA branch officer for Starforged Legion territory.
greeting: AMA Legion Branch. Exchange your Legion Scrip for Credent at the current rate.

name: Quartermaster Voss
title: Concordium Quartermaster
description: Official merchant of Concordium. Sells faction-approved equipment and supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the Concordium supply depot. What do you need, operative?

name: Archivist Thel
title: Arcanum Archivist Merchant
description: Official merchant of The Arcanum Seekers. Sells faction-approved equipment and supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the The Arcanum Seekers supply depot. What do you need, operative?

name: Armorer Drax
title: Hegemony Armorer
description: Official merchant of Iron Hegemony. Sells faction-approved equipment and supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the Iron Hegemony supply depot. What do you need, operative?

name: Broker Quinn
title: Cartel Broker
description: Official merchant of Meridian Cartel. Sells faction-approved equipment and supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the Meridian Cartel supply depot. What do you need, operative?

name: Supply Director Haas
title: OmniCorp Supply Director
description: Official merchant of Omnicorp. Sells faction-approved equipment and supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the Omnicorp supply depot. What do you need, operative?

name: Keeper Nym
title: Shard Keeper Merchant
description: Official merchant of Children Of The Shard. Sells faction-approved equipment and supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the Children Of The Shard supply depot. What do you need, operative?

name: Quartermaster Zara
title: Legion Quartermaster
description: Official merchant of Starforged Legion. Sells faction-approved equipment and supplies.
greeting: Welcome to the Starforged Legion supply depot. What do you need, operative?

name: AMA Officer Petra Calloway
title: Aegis Monetary Authority — Concordium Branch
description: Petra is a sharp-eyed AMA officer stationed at the Concordium capital. She maintains strict neutrality despite being surrounded by military culture. Known for her no-nonsense approach to exchange transactions and her habit of auditing the local treasury records 'just to keep everyone honest.'
greeting: AMA Branch Office — Concordium. Present your credentials and state the volume of your exchange. I process transactions, not small talk.

name: AMA Scholar Drex Nul
title: Aegis Monetary Authority — Arcanum Branch
description: Drex is a former Arcanum Seekers student who became more interested in economic theory than arcane knowledge. He writes papers on 'The Thermodynamics of Galactic Currency Flows' in his spare time.
greeting: Ah, a transaction seeker! The economic relationship between Arcane currency and the Credent is fascinating — particularly when you examine the volatility coefficients. But yes, I can exchange your currency. Let me pull up the current rates.

name: AMA Terminal IH-3
title: Aegis Monetary Authority — Iron Hegemony Automated Terminal
description: The Iron Hegemony preferred efficiency over personality, so they lobbied for an automated AMA terminal. IH-3 processes transactions with industrial efficiency and has no patience for errors.
greeting: TERMINAL IH-3 ACTIVE. INSERT CURRENCY VOLUME. EXCHANGE RATE DISPLAYED. CONFIRM OR ABORT. PROCESSING FEE APPLIES.

name: AMA Broker Sable Thorn
title: Aegis Monetary Authority — Meridian Branch
description: Sable Thorn navigated from Cartel trader to AMA broker with calculated grace. The Meridian branch is the busiest in Xylos by transaction volume. She occasionally tips clients about exchange rate trends.
greeting: Welcome, welcome! You've come to the right desk — the Meridian AMA branch handles more volume than all other branches combined. What are we converting today?

name: AMA Node OM-7
title: Aegis Monetary Authority — OmniCorp Integration
description: OmniCorp integrated the AMA terminal directly into their corporate network infrastructure. OM-7 is technically an AMA node but runs on OmniCorp servers. The AMA audits this arrangement quarterly.
greeting: OmniCorp AMA Integration Node — powered by OmniCorp CoreNet™. Your exchange request has been submitted to the AMA Ledger. Processing. Terms and conditions apply.

name: AMA Keeper Mirya of the Still Pool
title: Aegis Monetary Authority — Shard Branch
description: Mirya bridges spiritual and financial worlds: a genuine Shard practitioner who also holds AMA certification. She meditates between transactions and occasionally warns clients about 'spiritually inauspicious exchange moments.'
greeting: Breathe... the Shard sees all flows, including those of currency. I am Mirya. Let us proceed mindfully.

name: AMA Agent Rex Valdur
title: Aegis Monetary Authority — Starforged Legion Post
description: Rex is an AMA field agent who thrives in volatile frontier environments. He's processed exchanges under fire, during bombardments, and once mid-warp. He respects the Legion's boldness while maintaining AMA neutrality.
greeting: AMA Forward Station, Legion Post. Rex Valdur, at your service. Quick processing, fair rates — no extra charge for the excitement. What are we moving today?

name: Magister Kael
title: AMA Concordium Exchange
description: AMA exchange officer for Concordium. Exchange CRD to/from faction currency at live rates.
greeting: AMA Concordium Branch. Exchange CRD and CONCORDIUM currency at live market rates. How can I assist you?
